pokemon:honedge.name: Honedge
pokemon:honedge.summary: If anyone dares to grab its hilt, it wraps a blue cloth around that person’s arm and drains that person’s life energy completely.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: If anyone dares to grab its hilt, it wraps a blue cloth around that person’s arm and drains that person’s life energy completely.
Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
The blue eye on the sword’s handguard is the true body of Honedge. With its old cloth, it drains people’s lives away.
Honedge’s soul once belonged to a person who was killed a long time ago by the sword that makes up Honedge’s body.
Apparently this Pokémon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.
If anyone dares to grab its hilt, it wraps a blue cloth around that person’s arm and drains that person’s life energy completely.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: If anyone dares to grab its hilt, it wraps a blue cloth around that person’s arm and drains that person’s life energy completely.

pokemon:aegislash.name: Aegislash
pokemon:aegislash.summary: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.
Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
Its potent spectral powers allow it to manipulate others. It once used its powers to force people and Pokémon to build a kingdom to its liking.
In this defensive stance, Aegislash uses its steel body and a force field of spectral power to reduce the damage of any attack.
Generations of kings were attended by these Pokémon, which used their spectral power to manipulate and control people and Pokémon.
Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

pokemon:doublade.name: Doublade
pokemon:doublade.summary: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.
When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.
The two swords employ a strategy of rapidly alternating between offense and defense to bring down their prey.
Honedge evolves into twins. The two blades rub together to emit a metallic sound that unnerves opponents.
When Honedge evolves, it divides into two swords, which cooperate via telepathy to coordinate attacks and slash their enemies to ribbons.
The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.
